stack: Python MCP server using fastmcp + httpx, GPT-4o-mini for history summarization, portalocker for file locking
tools: get_local_structure, get_github_structure, get_git_history, save/load/delete_memory, set_compression, save/load_history, list_projects, get_project_summary, load_cross_project_memory, search_across_projects, save_global_memory, load_global_memory — 15 tools total
architecture: Single-file MCP server (server.py). Per-project: .mcp_memory.json + .mcp_history.json. Global: ~/.mcp_global_memory.json. File locking via portalocker. Corrupted JSON auto-backed up as .bak.timestamp.
compression: 3-level read-time compression (0=raw, 1=compact, 2=dense) using abbreviation dict + filler removal. 13 pytest tests in test_compression.py.
history_system: history_hook.py fires on UserPromptSubmit (every 10 msgs) and PreCompact. Reads transcript JSONL, calls GPT-4o-mini with 3-attempt exponential backoff. Saves to .mcp_history.json rolling 20-chunk window. Cleans temp files older than 7 days on startup.
current_work: Implementation complete. Robustness hardening + multi-project integration shipped. README updated. 53 tests passing. Ready for use.
validation: save_memory validates key format (^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]{1,100}$) and content size (10KB default, MCP_MAX_ENTRY_KB env var). Git timeout configurable via MCP_GIT_TIMEOUT (default 10s).
tests: 53 pytest tests across 4 files: test_compression.py (13), test_history.py (7), test_validation.py (14), test_multi_project.py (19). All pass. Use real temp dirs, no mocking.
multi_project: list_projects scans base_path for .mcp_memory.json. load_cross_project_memory aggregates with optional key filter. search_across_projects does case-insensitive full-text search. save/load_global_memory stores user-level facts at ~/.mcp_global_memory.json.
repo: github.com/kid-sid/memory_map — description: Persistent memory and conversation history MCP server for Claude Code.
hooks: Configured in .claude/settings.local.json per project — UserPromptSubmit (every 10 msgs) and PreCompact trigger history_hook.py. Uses venv Python path.
